description: CompositionGrey round neck sleeveless top made of 100% cotton, has sequinned detailing and graphic print on the chestFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's understated trend is perfectly captured in this luxe top with its plush fabric. The sequin detailing on this piece gives it an interesting dimension. Style this piece from s.oliver with jeggings, closed-toe casual shoes, and a structured blazer.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
